entries.note: Prompt descriptors stay canonical because the user explicitly locked prompt/comptime retention.
Prompt mode selection remains canonical and comptime-driven.
The optional-resumption decision type stays canonical at the root.
Canonical root error unions are expected to shrink away from raw-only runtime errors.
Canonical root reset errors are expected to follow the lowered-first root contract rather than raw stackful errors.
Canonical root Runtime is planned to become a lowered runtime handle instead of a stack-switch owner.
Canonical root Error has dropped raw-only AlreadyResolved and NestedNonDiagonalCapture.
Canonical root reset now requires explicit frontend Program values rather than plain authored body functions.
